official_sources.evidence: Binance documents Options as a derivatives API family separate from Spot, USD-M Futures, and COIN-M Futures.

runtime_isolation: Do not route Binance Options instruments, order books, account positions, balances, order writes, order queries, open orders, or fills through the current Spot/USD-M adapter paths. Options require an audited product scope, symbol model, signed REST request specs, parser fixtures, and reconciliation before runtime promotion.
unsafe_to_promote_without: option symbol parser covering expiry, strike, and side
signed option order lifecycle request specs
credential scope and product eligibility guard
runtime isolation from Spot and USD-M endpoints
